name: mypi
description: CLI tool that manages pi coding agent profiles, bundling extensions, skills, and prompt templates

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && { echo '#!/usr/bin/env bun'; bun build src/index.ts --target bun; } > dist/index.js && chmod +x dist/index.js && cp -r extensions dist/extensions && cp -r skills dist/skills && cp -r prompts dist/prompts
